creator: trs137@psu.edu
text:
New port: x11-themes/murrine-configurator, a gtkrc configuration tool for users of the Murrine GTK engine.

    Note for pmeumann@gmail.com: as of version 0.4.1, i think the gtkrc corruption problem is solved.  I've changed the ports makefile so that it installs murrine-configurator directly, rather than depending on Cimi's installer script.

How-To-Repeat: n/a
